title: TNTCart Counter
description: This mod helps with counting Tnt Minecarts for traps and railgans
body:
**TNT Minecart Counter** is a lightweight client-side utility mod specifically designed to accurately display how many TNT minecarts are currently on the tracks. Perfect for redstoners, trappers, and other players.

This mods counts how many carts on block that you watching on right now.(Not in inventory :/)
